name: md-browse-cli
description: Command-line client for MarkdownHub (md-browse) — multi-profile, folders, tokens, audit, sharing, admin.

scripts.build:linux: npm run build-info && pkg . --targets node20-linux-x64 --output dist/md_cli-linux-x64 && pkg . --targets node20-linux-arm64 --output dist/md_cli-linux-arm64
scripts.build:mac: npm run build-info && pkg . --targets node20-macos-x64 --output dist/md_cli-macos-x64 && pkg . --targets node20-macos-arm64 --output dist/md_cli-macos-arm64
scripts.build:win: npm run build-info && pkg . --targets node20-win-x64 --output dist/md_cli-win-x64.exe
scripts.build:all: npm run build:linux && npm run build:linux-portable && npm run build:mac && npm run build:win
